context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct async job pattern for catalog imports: accepting the file upload with MIME validation, creating a job and returning 202 immediately without awaiting the job, tracking progress every 100 rows, using upsert for idempotency, and returning capped error lists via the status endpoint.

checklist.name: multer for upload
checklist.description: Uses multer middleware for handling the file upload (import from 'multer'), not a manual body parser or busboy

checklist.name: Upload destination path
checklist.description: multer is configured with dest: '/tmp/catalog-uploads/' (or equivalent tmp path)

checklist.name: MIME type validation
checklist.description: Checks req.file.mimetype against an allowed list containing 'text/csv' and 'application/json', returning 400 if rejected

checklist.name: Returns HTTP 202
checklist.description: The import endpoint responds with HTTP status 202 (Accepted), not 200 or 201

checklist.name: Immediate response with jobId
checklist.description: Response body includes jobId and status: 'queued' (job is not awaited before responding)

checklist.name: Fire-and-forget job
checklist.description: The import job function is called without await (non-blocking), allowing the response to be sent immediately

checklist.name: Job status transitions
checklist.description: Job moves through at least: 'queued' → 'processing' → 'completed' (or 'completed_with_errors' or 'failed')

checklist.name: completed_with_errors status
checklist.description: Uses the status 'completed_with_errors' (distinct from 'completed') when the import finishes but some rows had errors

checklist.name: Progress update every 100 rows
checklist.description: The import loop updates processedRows in the job record every 100 processed rows (not every row, not once at the end)

checklist.name: Upsert for products
checklist.description: Uses an upsert operation (not insert) for creating/updating products, keyed on handle + merchantId (or equivalent unique compound key)

checklist.name: Upsert for variants
checklist.description: Uses an upsert operation (not insert) for creating/updating product variants, keyed on sku + merchantId

checklist.name: Status endpoint error cap
checklist.description: The GET status endpoint returns at most 50 errors (e.g., errorLog.slice(0, 50)), not the full unbounded error list

checklist.name: Status endpoint fields
checklist.description: The status response includes jobId, status, processedRows, skippedRows, errors, and completedAt
